overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character walking along a snow-covered riverbank through a dense winter forest. The scene begins in heavy fog with limited visibility that gradually clears to reveal a sunny, open mountain landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy riverbank path through dense foggy forest

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snow-covered riverbank surrounded by dense fog and snow-laden pine trees

entered.detail: dark flowing river cutting through the snowy landscape with snow-covered banks
deep snow covering the walking path with visible footprints
large rocks blanketed in thick snow along the river edge
tall evergreen trees heavy with accumulated snow on branches

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow snow-covered path beside a flowing river, surrounded by dense fog and tall pine trees. Large snow-covered boulders line the riverbank while visibility remains limited by the heavy winter fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined snowy trail with lifting fog

events.description: fog begins to clear and sunlight starts filtering through the trees improving visibility

agents.ego_description: continuing along the river path as the fog gradually lifts, navigating around a large pine tree trunk

entered.detail: massive pine tree trunk with snow-covered branches that the character walks around

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, the fog begins to lift slightly while walking past a large pine tree trunk on the left. The snow-covered boulders disappear behind as the path continues through the dense forest with the river flowing steadily on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy valley with visible mountain vista

events.description: sun breaks through completely and fog dissipates revealing blue sky and casting distinct shadows
distant snow-capped mountains become clearly visible as the fog clears completely

agents.ego_description: walking through open snowy landscape with clear skies and bright sunlight casting long shadows on the snow

entered.detail: snow-capped mountains visible in the distance as fog clears revealing the full vista
textured snowy edge along the river with visible snow drifts

segments.scene_description: The fog completely clears to reveal a bright sunny day with blue skies and distant mountain ranges. The character walks through an open snowy valley with the river on the right, as sunlight creates distinct shadows across the snow-covered ground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, fog-shrouded winter forest that gradually opens into a bright, sunlit mountain valley. It begins with a character walking along a narrow snow-covered path beside a flowing river, where visibility is heavily restricted by thick fog and towering pine trees. As the character progresses past a large pine trunk, the fog begins to lift and the riverbank boulders recede, allowing the forest to feel slightly more open. The scene then shifts as the mist clears completely, revealing a brilliant blue sky and distant mountain ranges. Finally, the camera follows the character into an expansive snowy valley where the river continues on the right and bright sunlight casts distinct shadows across the terrain.
